content:
jsec规则改造进度更新：

已改造: 26个规则
待改造: 20个规则

本次新增改造规则：
1. _rule_cond_wait_no_loop - call_graph查询pthread_cond_wait
2. _rule_open_permissive_perms - call_graph查询open/fopen

待改造规则分类：
- 需要数据流分析: _rule_memory_leak, _rule_integer_overflow, _rule_uninitialized_ptr_use, _rule_deadlock_patterns
- 需要复杂启发式: _rule_toctou_race, _rule_thread_leak_no_join, _rule_pthread_returns_unchecked
- C++语法检测: _rule_vla_usage, _rule_new_delete_mismatch, _rule_reinterpret_cast_unsafe, _rule_const_cast_unsafe, _rule_vector_string_bounds_check, _rule_missing_virtual_dtor, _rule_move_after_use, _rule_uncaught_exception, _rule_smart_ptr_cycle, _rule_cpp_deadlock_patterns, _rule_data_race_suspect, _rule_smart_ptr_get_unsafe
- 模式匹配: _rule_hardcoded_credentials

测试结果：8个test_checkers.py测试全部通过
